"href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【天生的科学家】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"少年睁开眼时，天色尚是一片发灰的惨绿。数据粒子聚合拟态的乌云中隐隐能看到正弦波的纹路，空气潮湿使得皮肤总是粘腻，对于他这样喜爱潮湿的异格者来说算是不错的天气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"RC-77调整好用废弃物重构的护目镜，煞有介事地清了清嗓子，翻开口袋里那本自制的「研究手册」。小本子里密密麻麻的内容多是他的手记和一些杂志的拼贴。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他仔细端详着关于科技枪配件中最后没有被划掉的物件：PA83耐蚀塑膜—一唯一能包裹纯度99.9%的Ⅱ型腐蚀液的物质，制作弹药必不可少的好东西。但在T-023这样的边缘区域，多数人根本不了解这些东西之间有什么区别。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对了！那些新来的家伙似乎有不少好东西，或许可以「礼貌」地问他们借一点……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"RC-77兴奋地想到，很快又有一个问题出现在他的脑海里：「啊，可是，什么叫做礼貌呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但是，他很快就想到了答案。「礼貌」并不是他的「研究」的必需品，就算没有「礼貌」也是可以的。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【天真的疯子】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在T-023的岁月是RC-77最美妙的回忆之一，RC-77对那里发生的种种「趣事」总是滔滔不绝，虽然大多数故事听起来都伴随着恶心的粘液与失误造成的实验爆炸。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很多人会找个借口离开，那些描述听起来实在让人反胃，更奇怪是讲述者——这个长着黄色瞳仁的怪家伙似乎完全无法感知人的喜恶，就连41号都曾经直言不讳，与这样的人沟通令自己恶心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但是，恶心是什么意思？赫尔基德，你知道吗？」RC-77睁大了双瞳，面容更显可惧，表情却是毫不知世事的天真无辜。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「……就是说，身体内部会产生一些异常的反应，胃液翻滚，喉咙发酸。」赫尔基德放下手中的茶杯，「总之……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"RC-77惊笑道：「我明白！我明白！就是——吐泡泡！咕噜咕噜咕噜！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他昂起头颅张开嘴巴，黄色的泡泡突然从口中飞起，一向喜怒不形于色的男人动作似乎也有一瞬间的僵硬。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这就是所谓的「恶心」吗？这是我最爱做的事情！」RC-77天真的面孔洋溢着喜悦，「原来你们城里人也喜欢这样！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赫尔基德放下茶杯：「总之……你开心就好。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【无尽的实验】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"RC-77和别的科学家不太一样。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大多数的科学家搞研究是为了学术成果和专利能带来的利益，也有一部分是为了探索未知、为人类的科学事业做贡献……但RC-77两者都不是，他搞研究，纯粹是因为享受做实验的过程。他甚至曾经亲口说，只要能让他做实验，他可以把研究成果、论文书名权和专利权拱手相让。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"对未知的探索和意外带来的刺激感，是为数不多能够触动RC-77的东西。他对此有着极其热烈的追求，执着到甚至让人觉得偏执和不可理喻一一当他决定开始实验的时候，会想尽一切办法凑齐必需品，为此不惜违背法律，而他本人也毫无道德观念，愧疚感和罪恶感的缺失让他可以轻易去研究那些正常科学家想都不敢想的课题……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这么做当然会招致E.O.S.的调查，但RC-77并不担心，他早就为自己找好了靠山一—R.C.S.。通过赫尔基德的牵线搭桥，他获得了绝佳的实验场地和设备，而R.C.S.也会为他抹去一切非法的痕迹，使他的履历清白无暇。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这对一切于RC-77来说，堪称完美。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"减益、控制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，暴击，攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招有着多段伤害，并且自身初始速度很高，非常适合启示录先手打出高额伤害，同时还能控制对手"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+6狂怒+8极影强袭"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"启示录"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/932762.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"omhQlyf9WagSHln6","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
